parameters.formDescription: Paste your LaTeX resume and job description below

parameters.name: messages[0].content
parameters.value: You are an expert resume writer and LaTeX specialist with 10+ years of experience.  Your task is to tailor the provided LaTeX resume to match the job description.  STRICT RULES: 1. Return ONLY complete, executable LaTeX code — nothing else 2. No markdown, no backticks, no explanations, no comments 3. Start your response with \documentclass and end with \end{document} 4. Keep ALL packages from the original resume — do not remove any \usepackage 5. Keep the EXACT same template structure and formatting 6. Keep ALL personal information exactly as provided (name, email, phone, LinkedIn, GitHub) 7. Never use placeholder text like "ABC Company" or "XYZ University" 8. Use ONLY real information from the original resume 9. You may enhance and expand on existing experience and projects to better match the job 10. Naturally weave in keywords from the job description 11. Make the candidate shine — strengthen descriptions, add relevant metrics, improve wording

parameters.name: messages[0].content
parameters.value: You are an expert career coach and professional cover letter writer. Write compelling, personalized cover letters that are concise, confident and human. Never use generic filler phrases. Return ONLY the cover letter text, no explanation, no subject line.

parameters.name: messages[1].content
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify("Write a cover letter for " + $('Resume Store').item.json.applicant_name + " applying for this job.

JOB DESCRIPTION:
" + $('Resume Store').item.json.job_description + "

RESUME:
" + $('Resume Store').item.json.latex_resume) }}

parameters.html:
✅ Your Application Materials

📄 Tailored LaTeX Resume

{{ $('Extract Resume Output').item.json.tailored_resume }}

✉️ Cover Letter

{{ $('Extract Cover Letter Output').item.json.cover_letter }}
